items.name: XNET
items.description: Secure communications for the original Xbox. XNET provides end-to-end encrypted text chat, voice chat, video chat, and secure file transfer on retail hardware. Built with NXDK, it uses a lightweight content-blind relay architecture and requires no accounts or centralized message storage.
